name: Best Demon Slayer Characters
description: Rank the best characters from Demon Slayer!

items.name: Tanjiro Kamado
items.hint: Water breathing protagonist with a kind heart

items.name: Nezuko Kamado
items.hint: Demon sister who fights to protect humans

items.name: Shinobu Kocho
items.hint: Insect Hashira with a deadly smile

items.name: Kyojuro Rengoku
items.hint: Flame Hashira, set your heart ablaze

items.name: Tengen Uzui
items.hint: Flashy Sound Hashira with three wives

items.name: Sanemi Shinazugawa
items.hint: Scarred Wind Hashira with a temper

items.name: Obanai Iguro
items.hint: Serpent Hashira with his snake Kaburamaru

items.name: Gyomei Himejima
items.hint: Blind Stone Hashira, strongest of them all

items.name: Kanao Tsuyuri
items.hint: Quiet girl who flips a coin to decide

items.name: Kagaya Ubuyashiki
items.hint: Wise leader of the Demon Slayer Corps
